input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule EV.4.10.1 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:

EV.4.10.1 Teams must have a Hand Cart to transport their Accumulator Container(s)

final_answer: Teams must have a Hand Cart to transport their Accumulator Container(s)
